notes: First deploy failed: filterFormula used `{!$Record.Status__c} = 'Approved'` which is invalid for picklist fields. Salesforce requires ISPICKVAL() or TEXT(). Fixed to ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status__c}, 'Approved'). Second deploy passed.

check-flow-references.sh has its own Python syntax error in the shipped script (return Trueimport json mashed together on one line). Doesn't block — script exited 0. Worth flagging upstream via /sf-feedback.
